title: Remove, inspect and refit heavy vehicle wheel and tyre assemblies
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, inspect and refit heavy vehicle wheel and tyre assemblies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove wheel and tyre assembly

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for wheel and tyre removal, inspection and re-fitting activity1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for wheel and tyre removal, inspection and re-fitting activity1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for wheel and tyre removal, inspection and re-fitting activity1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove wheel and tyre assembly

elements.title: Remove and inspect wheel and tyre assembly

pcs.text: Remove wheel and tyre assembly according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Inspect wheel and tyre assembly, mounting points and fittings according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove wheel and tyre assembly according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Inspect wheel and tyre assembly, mounting points and fittings according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove wheel and tyre assembly according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Inspect wheel and tyre assembly, mounting points and fittings according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove and inspect wheel and tyre assembly

elements.title: Refit wheel and tyre assembly

pcs.text: Identify required information for refitting activity 3.2 Re-fit and adjust wheel and tyre assembly according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements3.3 Complete tightening sequence and torque settings according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.4 Check wheel assembly for correct assembly and run-out according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required information for refitting activity 3.2 Re-fit and adjust wheel and tyre assembly according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements3.3 Complete tightening sequence and torque settings according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.4 Check wheel assembly for correct assembly and run-out according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required information for refitting activity 3.2 Re-fit and adjust wheel and tyre assembly according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements3.3 Complete tightening sequence and torque settings according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.4 Check wheel assembly for correct assembly and run-out according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Refit wheel and tyre assembly

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
